purpose: compact production proof that binds auth floor, push session minting, journal rows, lease fencing, and read-only recovery inspect to the same remote identity

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

blocked_when: fresh live hashes do not match the journaled target
the journal cannot prove a safe finish or rollback
the claim lease has expired and the worker is fenced

proof: remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity observed at different times
local-edited carries the imported local edits used to build the canonical plan
runner owns preflight, remote snapshot hash listing, dry-run plan upload, batch apply, journal inspect, and recovery
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy

required_invariants: push auth must be at least as strict as the current export HMAC family
mutating push requests must carry a push session, idempotency key, and canonical push signature
claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation
inspect is read-only and must come before any mutating recovery mode
fresh live hashes must still be checked before finish, rollback, or auto
browser-visible inspection stays on the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy
